theme.name: Skyline

motif.name: skyline
motif.notes: Rising gesture (2, 3 semitones up) that peaks and falls. The 'ascent and view' motif. Augmentation stretches the anticipation. Inversion questions the ascent. Retrograde collapses the descent.

theme.notes: F major—warm, open, inviting. No chromatic color like Mixolydian. Pure major tonality for the bright daylight. The motif rises and falls like a skyline itself. Perfect for ambient instrumental that has clear emotional arc: climb, view, realization, fade.
